entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cicer arietinum L.) used in the lines trials

entities.name: COMPUTER SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Computational tools used to compare the efficiency of different experimental designs

entities.name: DUPLICATED AUGMENTED DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design consisting of two sets of augmented designs

entities.name: AUGMENTED DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design using blocks of plots flanked by controls to adjust for block effects

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: A standard experimental design used as a baseline for comparison

entities.name: INCOMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design found to be more efficient and less input demanding than the duplicated augmented design

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Practical experiments conducted in the field to validate experimental designs

entities.name: BLOCK EFFECTS
entities.description: Variations within experimental blocks that require adjustment

entities.name: RANDOMIZATION OF TREATMENTS
entities.description: The process of randomly assigning treatments within an experimental design

entities.name: REGULAR CONTROLS
entities.description: Standard control plots used in augmented designs

entities.name: RANDOM CONTROLS
entities.description: Control plots assigned randomly in augmented designs

entities.name: FIXED CONTROLS
entities.description: Control plots that remain constant across sets in a duplicated augmented design
